screens.name: projects/5670372511067729208/screens/cc3f1435a8904ddf80602c2e136c7464
screens.prompt:
Title: Deniz Restaurant Atmosphere Gallery Grid
Context: Mediterranean seafood restaurant website landing page gallery section.
Description of the screen: A sophisticated 'Atmosferimizi Keşfedin' (Discover Our Atmosphere) gallery section for Deniz Restaurant. The section features a centered title in Playfair Display serif and a subtitle 'Bodrum\'un en güzel deniz manzarasıyla yemek keyfi' in clean sans-serif. Below, a 4-column masonry grid displays 8 high-quality image placeholders showcasing the elegant restaurant interior, freshly grilled seafood dishes, stunning Bodrum sunset views, and meticulously set tables. Each gallery item features a smooth zoom-in hover effect with a semi-transparent deep ocean blue (#1a365d) overlay and a gold (#d4af37) caption reveal (e.g., 'Şık İç Mekan', 'Taze Deniz Ürünleri', 'Deniz Manzarası'). The layout is modern and visually immersive, suggesting a lightbox functionality for full-screen viewing.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: Deniz Restaurant Atmosphere Gallery Grid

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the "Atmosferimizi Keşfedin" (Discover Our Atmosphere) gallery section for Deniz Restaurant:

- **Deniz Restaurant Atmosphere Gallery Grid**: This section features a modern 4-column masonry grid that beautifully showcases your restaurant's interior, grilled seafood, and sunset views. Each image includes a smooth zoom-in hover effect with a deep ocean blue overlay and gold caption reveal, creating an immersive experience for potential diners.

The landing page now includes a hero, menu categories, reservations/contact, and a gallery. Would you like to finish it off with a **Müşteri Yorumları (Testimonials)** section or a **Footer** with social media links and an embedded Google Map?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design a "Müşteri Yorumları" section with high-rated reviews
Create a "Footer" with social media and an embedded Google Map
Add a floating "Rezervasyon" button for the entire landing page
